# UC-23.5.6 ┬Ę Production Throughput vs Forecast Capacity

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Platform &middot; **Type:** Business &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We tally what each assembly line truly produced compared with what planners scheduled for that week, and when those totals disagree we trace whether machines stopped too long, ran slower than designed, or threw away partsŌĆöwell before shortage talks drift toward trucking lanes studied elsewhere.*

---

## Description

Correlates hourly plant-floor throughput (**Counter_Good**, rejects, `State_Code`) against `planned_runtime_sec` and `downtime_sec` telemetry so Splunk derives **Availability**, **Performance**, and **Quality**, then multiplies into **OEE** before comparing `actual_good` units to `forecast_units` pulled from `sop_fc_line_week.csv` / `dbx:sap_ibp_demand_plan` bridges ŌĆö exposing `variance_pct` band breaches plus bottleneck hints aligned with Nakajima **Six Big Losses** taxonomy rather than ERP-to-warehouse handoff timestamps studied elsewhere in cat-23.5.

## Value

VP Manufacturing and SIOP leads cite **OEE ├Ś forecast-variance** overlays when Monthly Executive **S&OP** (**Day-20**) narratives reconcile Operations Truth versus Demand Plans frozen after Supply Review (**Day-10**) ŌĆö shrinking `MAPE` misses referenced alongside **Gartner** industrial quartile spreads (**median ~60ŌĆō65% OEE**) before EBITDA narratives fracture; Aberdeen productivity commentary tying multi-point **OEE** lifts to margin expansion informs CapEx debates referencing **Proficy**, **Opcenter**, or **SAP Digital Manufacturing Cloud** bets already underway.

## Implementation

(1) Land `sparkplug_b:metric`, `factorytalk:production_event`, `dbx:sap_afru` plus JDBC `dbx:sap_ibp_demand_plan` / nightly `sop_fc_line_week.csv` into `manufacturing_ot`; (2) normalize `Counter_*` aliases per PLC naming conventions using `props.conf`; (3) publish Dashboard Studio `BA-OEE-Forecast-Variance` tying waterfall **OEE**, line `actual_good` versus `forecast_units`, Pareto downtime overlays; (4) route `variance_pct` regressions to Planning while `oee_avg` crises escalate Plant Engineering before outbound logistics KPI siblings reinterpret throughput misses.

## Detailed Implementation

### Prerequisites
- Splunk Enterprise **9.2+** or **Splunk Cloud** search tier; roles granting `index=manufacturing_ot`, KV lookup rights on `sop_fc_line_week.csv`, and Heavy Forwarder / Universal Forwarder paths approved for **OPC-UA** collectors and **MQTT** brokers inside the plant VLAN.
- Splunk DB Connect (**Splunkbase [2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)**) executing JDBC against SAP IBP staging (`dbx:sap_ibp_demand_plan`), SAP **AFRU/AUFK/AFKO** confirmations replicated into HANA/SQL Server views (`dbx:sap_afru`), or Oracle Demantra / D365 forecast extracts ŌĆö identities restricted to **SELECT** on curated projections only.
- Splunk Add-on Builder (**Splunkbase [2962](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2962)**) optional packaging for REST pollers hitting FactoryTalk `/api/factorytalk/v1/orders`, Siemens Opcenter REST `/api/Opcenter/v1/Manufacturing/Orders`, Plex `/api/plex/v1/production-events`, or Tulip `/api/v3/runs` when OPC tags alone omit order context.
- Plant OT networking: outbound **TCP 4840** OPC-UA client paths toward ControlLogix gateways; **MQTT 1883/8883** toward HiveMQ/EMQX brokers publishing **Sparkplug B** topics (`spBv1.0/{group}/NDATA/{edge}/{device}`); TLS mutual-auth posture documented with OT Security sign-off.
- Baseline physics: Nakajima-style **OEE** benchmarks cite roughly **85%** as exceptional steady-state plants versus **60%** portfolio average per literature aggregated by **MESA International** surveys ŌĆö tune alert corridors against your vertical (pharma versus discrete automotive).
- Forecast governance: coordinate `fc_ver` strings with Supply Review (**Day-10**) and Executive **S&OP** (**Day-20**) publication locks so Splunk lookups never mismatch PlanningŌĆÖs frozen horizon accidentally.

**Step 1 ŌĆö Configure data collection**

Stand up three parallel tributaries into `index=manufacturing_ot`.

**(A) OPC-UA + Sparkplug telemetry:** Deploy Ignition **8.x**, **KEPServerEX** with ThingWorx Connector, or vendor bundles that normalize **OPC-UA NodeId** paths such as `ns=2;s=PlantFloor.Line1.Counter_Good`, `ns=2;s=PlantFloor.Line1.Counter_Reject`, `ns=2;s=PlantFloor.Line1.State_Code`, plus speed proxies feeding `ideal_cycle_sec` derivatives. Emit JSON lines through Splunk HTTP Event Collector receivers (`inputs.conf` **HTTP Event Collector** global stanza plus `indexes.conf` routing) ŌĆö sourcetypes `sparkplug_b:metric` when payloads decode Sparkplug **NDATA** metric baskets, or `factorytalk:production_event` when Rockwell middleware batches counters hourly. Expected volume: discrete automotive mixed-model lines often land **50ŌĆō250 KB/minute** per cell once millisecond scans collapse into minute buckets upstream.

**(B) JDBC confirmation grain:** Splunk DB Connect rising-column inputs hitting SAP `AFRU` (**goods movements**, `LMNG` yielded quantities tied to `AUFNR` orders), joined in-SQL to `AFKO` (**shop-floor orders**) and `AUFK` (**order master**) so Splunk receives `WERKS`, `ARBPL` work-centre, `GSTRP` basic dates ŌĆö sourcetype `dbx:sap_afru`. Poll `cron_schedule = 0 */15 * * *` during steady ops; watermark `LASTCHANGED` or `CPUDT` columns OT Basis exposes ŌĆö never bind SYSDBA passwords inside SPL.

**(C) Forecast bridge lookup:** Publish `sop_fc_line_week.csv` (`line_id`,`iso_week`,`forecast_units`,`fc_system_version`,`scenario_code`) refreshed nightly from SAP IBP extracts (`/IBP/DEMAND` APIs mirroring `dbx:sap_ibp_demand_plan` rows), **Anaplan** export REST snapshots, **Blue Yonder** forecast feeds, or **D365 Supply Chain Management Master Planning** worksheets ŌĆö whichever Planning owns as source-of-truth for volume ties back to `iso_week` buckets Splunk derives via `strftime` from `prod_hour`.

Define `props.conf` `TIME_PREFIX` so `_time` reflects line-clock truth ŌĆö especially after daylight-saving jumps inside Midwest plants ŌĆö and `TRANSFORMS` mapping `State_Code` enumerations (**RUN**, **STARVED**, **DOWN**, **CHG**) identical to **MES** consoles operators acknowledge during Tier-1 meetings.

**Step 2 ŌĆö Create the search and dashboard panels**

Paste the SPL bundled in the `spl` field ŌĆö it deliberately computes **Availability** as roughly (planned_runtime_sec minus downtime_sec) divided by planned_runtime_sec, **Performance** as roughly produced multiplied by ideal_cycle_sec divided by runtime_act, **Quality** as Counter_Good divided by (Counter_Good plus Counter_Reject), then **OEE** as Availability multiplied by Performance multiplied by Quality, aligning with textbook definitions rooted in Nakajima **Total Productive Maintenance** vocabulary before blending hourly `stats` aggregates.

Join `lookup sop_fc_line_week.csv` after `iso_week` normalization ŌĆö forecast-variance semantics follow 100 times (actual_good minus forecast_units) divided by forecast_units; planners interpret positive percentages as beating forecast volume while negatives expose miss-risk feeding SIOP escalation decks.

Clone alerts into three tiers: (1) `oee_avg < 0.40` sustained four consecutive hours ŌåÆ Manufacturing Engineering paging per internal Major Loss thresholds referenced alongside **NIST GCR** downtime-dollar narratives for CFO storytelling; (2) `abs(variance_pct) > 15` while `oee_avg Ōēź 0.60` flags forecast fidelity debates referencing **Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE)** hygiene classes (**AICPC/APICS** guidance bands **70ŌĆō85%** average accuracy); (3) `bottleneck_hint="availability_loss"` yet Maintenance CRM shows planned changeover codes ŌåÆ route to Tier-2 suppression macros referencing CMMS correlation lookups optional in Step 4.

Dashboard Studio stacks: **OEE waterfall** (pseudo-waterfall via `appendpipe` deltas); **Pareto** of downtime reasons keyed off `factorytalk:downtime_event` companion sourcetype when present; dual-axis **line chart** `actual_good` versus `forecast_units` across `prod_hour`; optional **sankey** linking `State_Code` transitions sampled every fifteen minutes ŌĆö visuals explicitly cited so technicians recognise artefacts inside weekly Constraint Review rituals (**Day-10** cadence alignment).

**Step 3 ŌĆö Validate**

Pick five `line_id` tuples surfaced near thresholds; reconcile `Counter_Good` deltas inside Splunk against **SAP COHV/C011** confirmations or Opcenter tablet totals ŌĆö mismatches trace to `LMNG` unit-of-measure conversions (**EA** versus **KG**) hidden inside JDBC extracts until `props` `EVAL` aliases multiply packaging factors.

Cross-check `forecast_units` against SAP IBP Excel workbook pinned during Supply Review ŌĆö variance ties must survive planner sign-off before accusing Operations.

Instrument `_indextime - _time` histograms ŌĆö ingest delays exceeding twelve hours invalidate `fc_accuracy_proxy` storytelling until DB Connect watermark health restores.

Compare `Availability` numerator against CMMS `WO` timestamps ŌĆö scheduled tooling swaps deliberately coded **SETUP** must subtract from `planned_runtime_sec` numerator logic through nightly `planned_runtime_sec` augment table feeding lookups ŌĆö Step 3 catches modelling gaps early.

OPC snapshot lag tests: correlate `State_Code` flips against operator **Andon** acknowledgements inside **MES** UI ŌĆö Splunk trailing fifteen-minute buckets sometimes flatten bursts shorter than RFID heartbeat cadence until `span` tightened inside investigative clones.

**Step 4 ŌĆö Operationalize**

Publish Dashboard Studio workbook `BA-OEE-Forecast-Variance` with header ribbons tying `TEEP` optional tiles (`TEEP = OEE ├Ś utilization` versus twenty-four-seven theoretical fence) sourced from supplemental `scheduled_hours` lookups Plant Finance maintains ŌĆö clarify TEEP differs from headline **OEE** so executives avoid apples-to-oranges debates during quarterly earnings rehearsals cited beside **Deloitte** manufacturing outlook narratives referencing alignment anxiety metrics.

Wire alerts into Microsoft Teams Manufacturing channels plus ServiceNow `CHG` bridges whenever `MES` correlates `factorytalk:downtime_event` `reason_code` with Maintenance backlog IDs ŌĆö RACI assigns Production Planning owns `variance_pct`, Plant Engineering owns `oee_avg`.

Retention: `manufacturing_ot` warm tier ninety days rolling for investigative SPL; freeze `summary indexing` derivatives weekly when licence budgets constrain repeated `stats` fan-out across eighteen-month horizons demanded during capital justification hearings referencing **NIST GCR** downtime-dollar citations without double-counting sibling shipment KPI narratives housed elsewhere.

Document escalation ladders aligning Tier-1 daily boards (**Day-cadence**) versus weekly `constraint_review` (**Week-cadence**) ŌĆö Splunk panels hyperlink runbooks anchored on `Six Big Losses` taxonomy (**Equipment Failure**, **Setup**, **Idling**, **Reduced Speed**, **Defects**, **Reduced Yield**) so RCA drills remain grounded versus speculative rhetoric.

**Step 5 ŌĆö Troubleshooting**

- **Planned changeover coded like breakdown** ŌĆö CMMS `WO` categories `SETUP` occasionally collapse into generic `DOWN` buckets inside `factorytalk:downtime_event` extracts ŌĆö reconcile `reason_family` enrichment macros referencing ERP routing `AFVV` strings before accusing Availability losses.

- **Micro-stop threshold ambiguity** ŌĆö classification scripts toggling `<=120` versus `<=60` seconds materially swing **Performance** five-to-fifteen points ŌĆö freeze thresholds inside `threshold_lookup.csv` versioned alongside PLC ladder revisions.

- **OPC-UA tag drift post firmware** ŌĆö `Counter_Good` NodeIds renamed (`Good_Count`ŌåÆ`PART_COUNT_GOOD`) silently zero Splunk totals until `props` `FIELDALIAS` layers mirror PLC programmer releases logged inside OT Git.

- **Ignition versus KEPServer timestamp skew** ŌĆö sub-second discrepancies (**100ŌĆō500 ms**) distort `Performance` correlations versus `MES` pallet scans ŌĆö clamp `strptime` buckets to nearest quarter-second using `bucket_time` macros shared with historian QA scripts.

- **Sparkplug birth/death gaps** ŌĆö MQTT reconnect storms emit `NBIRTH` gaps translating into five-to-thirty-second `Counter` freezes resembling starvation though mechanical lines remained powered ŌĆö overlay `sparkplug_b:metric` `seq` deltas ignoring gaps flagged `NBIRTH` sequence resets.

- **IBP versus Splunk baseline mismatch** ŌĆö `fc_ver` stale while Supply Chain publishes `scenario_code=SOP_LOCKED` revision `2026-W17-B` ŌĆö lookups referencing outdated `scenario_code` inflate `variance_pct` noise until nightly `lookup` refresh jobs honour `Planning.calendar` freeze timestamps.

- **Demand-shaping distortions** ŌĆö quarter-end distributor incentives spike `forecast_units` temporarily though `actual_good` chase incentives unrelated to shop-floor reliability ŌĆö annotate `pull_forward` toggles sourced from Commercial Ops spreadsheets referenced inside `lookup` qualifiers.

- **Scrap versus rework reassignment** ŌĆö Quality shifts `Counter_Reject` into `rework_station` buckets mid-shift ŌĆö `Quality` denominator swings unless rework SPL merges `parts_scrapped` versus `parts_sent_to_deburr` aliases nightly.

- **Weekend overtime pushes** ŌĆö `planned_runtime_sec` defaults (**28800**) ignore Saturday throughput bursts absent supplemental `scheduled_hours` overlay ŌĆö `Availability` artificially depressed until `planned_runtime_sec` augmented via `shift_calendar` lookups Operations publishes each Friday.

- **Peak-demand energy shaving** ŌĆö Facilities deliberately `CAP` `State_Code` after `Demand_Response` teleregistration signals ŌĆö `Performance` dips benign yet `EnergyMgmt` annotations absent trigger false RCA loops unless `demand_response_active` flag joins SPL through `lookup`.

- **Predictive-maintenance windows embedded inside shift** ŌĆö `DT` classified `MAINT` counted inside `downtime_sec` numerator identical to breakdown semantics unless `planned_pm` Boolean separates numerator adjustments referenced earlier.

- **MES outage blanks downtime reasons** ŌĆö `factorytalk:downtime_event` ingest halts though `PLC` buffers accumulate `Alarm` stacks offline ŌĆö correlate `MES_HEALTH` pings parallel ingest via `Splunk OT Add-on` patterns optional path until MQTT redundancy restores.

## SPL

```spl
index=manufacturing_ot (sourcetype="sparkplug_b:metric" OR sourcetype="factorytalk:production_event" OR sourcetype="siemens:opcenter:order_event") earliest=-168h@h
| eval line_id=tostring(coalesce(line_id, production_line, werk_line, resource_id))
| eval Counter_Good=tonumber(coalesce(Counter_Good, counter_good, parts_good, "0"))
| eval Counter_Reject=tonumber(coalesce(Counter_Reject, counter_reject, parts_scrap, "0"))
| eval State_Code=tostring(coalesce(State_Code, line_state_code, "UNKNOWN"))
| eval planned_runtime_sec=tonumber(coalesce(planned_runtime_sec, scheduled_seconds, "28800"))
| eval downtime_sec=tonumber(coalesce(downtime_sec, downtime_seconds, lost_seconds, "0"))
| eval ideal_cycle_sec=tonumber(coalesce(ideal_cycle_sec, takt_ideal_sec, nominal_cycle_seconds, "45"))
| eval runtime_act=max(planned_runtime_sec - downtime_sec, 1)
| eval Availability=if(planned_runtime_sec>0 and downtime_sec<=planned_runtime_sec, (planned_runtime_sec-downtime_sec)/planned_runtime_sec, null())
| eval produced=Counter_Good+Counter_Reject
| eval Performance=if(runtime_act>0 and ideal_cycle_sec>0, min(1.25, produced*ideal_cycle_sec/runtime_act), null())
| eval Quality=if(produced>0, Counter_Good/produced, null())
| eval OEE=Availability*Performance*Quality
| bin _time span=1h as prod_hour
| stats avg(Availability) as avail_avg avg(Performance) as perf_avg avg(Quality) as qual_avg avg(OEE) as oee_avg sum(Counter_Good) as actual_good sum(produced) as actual_total max(State_Code) as last_state by line_id prod_hour
| eval iso_week=strftime(prod_hour,"%Y-%V")
| lookup sop_fc_line_week.csv line_id iso_week OUTPUT forecast_units fc_system_version AS fc_ver
| eval variance_pct=if(isnotnull(forecast_units) AND forecast_units>0, round(100*(actual_good-forecast_units)/forecast_units, 2), null())
| eval abs_variance_pct=abs(variance_pct)
| eval fc_accuracy_proxy=if(isnotnull(forecast_units) AND forecast_units>0 AND forecast_units!=actual_good, round(100*(1-abs(actual_good-forecast_units)/forecast_units), 2), null())
| eval bottleneck_hint=case(avail_avg<0.85,"availability_loss", perf_avg<0.95 AND avail_avg>=0.85,"rate_loss", qual_avg<0.95 AND avail_avg>=0.85 AND perf_avg>=0.95,"quality_loss", oee_avg>=0.60 AND abs(variance_pct)<15,"within_band", 1=1,"multi_factor")
| where isnull(oee_avg) OR oee_avg < 0.60 OR abs(variance_pct) > 15 OR bottleneck_hint!="within_band"
| sort - abs_variance_pct
| table prod_hour line_id avail_avg perf_avg qual_avg oee_avg forecast_units actual_good variance_pct bottleneck_hint fc_ver last_state
```

## Visualization

Dashboard Studio composition: stacked **OEE waterfall** panels separating `Availability`, `Performance`, `Quality` gap deltas; ranked **Pareto** bars fed by `factorytalk:downtime_event` `reason_code` aggregates when paired ingest exists; dual-series **line chart** plotting `actual_good` versus `forecast_units` across `prod_hour` with `fc_ver` overlay annotations; optional **sankey** diagram consuming `State_Code` transition `transaction` spans sampled every fifteen minutes for bottleneck storytelling alongside **splunk.singlevalue** gauges colouring `variance_pct` corridors (**┬▒15%** tolerance typical mass-market discrete manufacturing guardrail unless SIOP publishes tighter envelopes).

## Known False Positives

Authorized tooling changeovers logged inside CMMS under `SETUP` families occasionally inherit `UNCATEG` downtime buckets inside `factorytalk:downtime_event` extracts ŌĆö Availability plunges despite planners approving forty-five-minute inserts aligned with Lean cadences until `reason_family` lookups reconcile coded `AFVV` routing strings from SAP `AFKO`. Micro-interruption classification macros flipping `<=120` versus `<=90` seconds thresholds materially rearrange `Performance` five-to-twelve percentage points because jitter near arbitrary boundaries separates `IDLE_STARVED` buckets ŌĆö freeze thresholds alongside PLC ladder freeze tags published quarterly. `Counter_Good` OPC NodeIds renamed after Allen-Bradley firmware refreshes silently zero Splunk deltas until `FIELDALIAS` catch `PART_GOOD_ACCUM` synonyms OT programmers checked into GitLab weeks earlier ŌĆö dashboards mimic starvation absent mechanical faults. Parallel historians (**Ignition Tag Historian** versus **FactoryTalk Metrics**) occasionally disagree **150 ms** on `State_Code` transitions causing `Performance` numerator denominators to lag `MES` pallet scans though conveyors stayed synchronous ŌĆö widen `bin` buckets cautiously before accusing rate-loss clusters. MQTT `NBIRTH` certificate churn across HiveMQ clusters emits fifteen-to-thirty-second telemetry gaps resembling starvation despite uninterrupted spindle currents until `sparkplug` `seq` gaps flagged benign. Demand-plan snapshots referencing `scenario=W17_PREEXEC` mismatch Splunk `lookup` rows frozen at `scenario=W17_PUBLISHED` ŌĆö `variance_pct` spikes purely Planning reconciliation artefact until nightly `fc_ver` watermark monitors succeed. Commercial `pull-forward` incentives inflate `forecast_units` temporarily separate from mechanical reliability yet `actual_good` falls short whenever distributors postpone pickups unrelated to shop-floor `OEE`. Quality supervisors mid-shift relabel `scrap` baskets into `rework` queues ŌĆö `Quality` denominators oscillate unless nightly `parts_scrapped` reconciliations merge rework routers Saturday overtime bursts omitted from `planned_runtime_sec` defaults inflate `Availability` alarms absent supplemental `shift_calendar` overlays Facilities publishes Fridays. `Demand_Response` curtailment programmes deliberately throttle `State_Code` despite intact tooling ŌĆö `Performance` dips benign absent Facilities `demand_response_active` annotation bridging SPL through `lookup`. Predictive `MAINT` windows counted identical to stochastic breakdown `DT` inflate `Availability` misses unless `planned_pm` booleans subtract numerator adjustments sourced from SAP `IW39` extracts Splunk optionally joins IT `MES` outages suppress `downtime_reason` altogether leaving Splunk `Availability` numerator reliant solely on PLC `Alarm` caches buffered offline until MQTT redundancy heals.
